settings.heading: Cricket Tournament Trophy Combo Packs — Winner, Runner-Up & MoM in One Order
settings.subheading: Everything a tennis-ball or season cricket tournament needs in a single bundle — winner cup, runner-up trophy, Man of the Series, Best Batsman & Bowler awards, plus participation medals. Custom names, team logos and event date engraved. Delivered pan-India from Bangalore.
settings.primary_cta_label: Get a combo quote on WhatsApp
settings.features_heading: What's inside a cricket combo pack
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices for tennis-ball/local tournaments. Final quote depends on trophy size, material and engraving. GST invoice available.
settings.steps_heading: How to order your tournament combo

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: A cricket tournament trophy combo from Meru Trophy bundles the winner cup, runner-up trophy, Man of the Match/Series, Best Batsman and Best Bowler awards, and participation medals in one order — with team names, logos and dates engraved free. Starter combos begin around ₹1,499; full season-league kits go up to ₹25,000+. Order on WhatsApp at +91 78922 07252 with your award list and event date.

settings.heading: One bundle for the whole tournament
settings.text: Organising a gully, corporate, society or tennis-ball cricket tournament means you need several awards — not just one trophy. Buying them piecemeal is slow and mismatched. Our combo packs are designed so every award shares a consistent look, arrives together, and is engraved with the right name and category. Whether it's a one-day box-cricket event or a two-month premier league, we build the kit around your prize list and budget.

settings.title: Winner & Runner-Up cups
settings.text: Tall, photogenic cricket cups in metal or fibre — the hero pieces for your presentation ceremony.

settings.title: Individual performance awards
settings.text: Man of the Series, Best Batsman, Best Bowler, Best Fielder, Emerging Player — engraved with recipient names.

settings.title: Participation medals
settings.text: Gold/silver/bronze finish medals with ribbon for every player or team — from ₹25 per piece in bulk.

settings.title: Team logo & sponsor branding
settings.text: UV-printed or laser-engraved team logos, sponsor names and tournament titles at no extra design charge.

settings.spec: Winner + Runner-up + MoM + Best Bat + Best Bowl
Custom big trophies + full awards set + 50+ medals

settings.title: Share your prize list
settings.text: WhatsApp us your award categories, team count and event date.

settings.title: Pick designs & budget
settings.text: We send matching combo options with photos and a single quote.

settings.title: Approve engraving proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and titles on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Delivered together
settings.text: Safely packed and shipped pan-India in time for your final.

settings.question: Can I mix trophies and medals in one combo?
settings.answer: Yes — that's the point of a combo. A typical kit pairs a few premium trophies (winner, runner-up, individual awards) with a bulk set of participation medals, all in one order and one invoice.

settings.question: Do you engrave team names and the tournament logo?
settings.answer: Yes. Recipient names, team names, the tournament title and your sponsor/club logo are included free. Send us the logo as PNG/AI and the name list in a sheet.

settings.question: How fast can a cricket combo be delivered?
settings.answer: Standard combos ship in 3–5 business days after proof approval; large custom league kits need 7–10 days. For last-minute finals, WhatsApp us — we regularly expedite tennis-ball tournament orders.

settings.question: What's the cheapest cricket trophy for a local tournament?
settings.answer: Budget fibre cups start around ₹150–₹300, and participation medals from ₹25 in bulk. A complete starter combo for a small tennis-ball tournament begins near ₹1,499.

settings.heading: Planning a cricket tournament?
settings.text: Send your prize list and event date — we'll design a matching combo and quote within the hour.
